reviews.comment:
Es muy cálido, hace ya casi 8 años que paso a comprar y cargar combustible, jamas recibí un mal trato, siempre con la mejor voluntad para atenderte.

En el minimarket, ni hablar de la buena atención .

Jorge gracias por la buena onda de siempre!!

(Translated by Google)
It's very welcoming. I've been going there to buy gas and fill up for almost eight years now, and I've never received bad service. They're always very helpful.

And the service at the convenience store is excellent.

Thanks, Jorge, for always being so friendly!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10539008023529743134/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTZ3BmbU93EAE
